$comment: Canon Knowledge Production V1 — foundational domains. STATE: production IN PROGRESS (Sprints 2A-2C + 3 + Production Batch 4 + 5 + 6 + 7 + 8 + 9; 770 units). The canonical source หลักมหาภูต (ส. หยกฟ้า) is available as OCR; D-067 added the book's Named Positions; D-068 added the optional `context` applicability qualifier so chart-scoped facts are representable faithfully. Units are produced FROM the source pages (reference-only provenance, D-057) — never invented (D-066: extraction allowed, generation forbidden) — and validated through the real platform by test/validation/thai/thai_canon_production_sprint2_test.dart. CONVENTION: a unit WITHOUT context is a general/unconditional fact (e.g. natural significations jupiter→learning/career, moon→finance, recurring identically across charts); a unit WITH context {type, value} is true ONLY within that scope (here archetype_chart:<verbatim Thai chart heading from the page>). Optional `condition` (verbatim from source) scopes a general signification without chart context (Batch 7, p16). Planet Library attributes use `relates_to` → `attribute.*` value tokens (Batch 8, D-072). The context value is the source's own chart name (verbatim, not translated) so no inference/external knowledge is introduced.
